solutions.solution: The figure may be labelled as shown in the following figure. It is clear from the figure that there are seventeen triangles in the upper half of the figure ABGE = Î”EIJ, Î”EFM, Î”AFE, Î”HFI, Î”FOP, Î”OBP, Î”PBG, Î”PGQ, Î”PMQ, Î”PFM, Î”FBM, Î”BMG, Î”FMG, Î”FEG, Î”FBP, Î”MPG and Î”FBG. There are four triangles in the lower half of the figure EGCD = Î”EMD, Î”JMK, Î”DKL and Î”DMN. There are four triangles in the main figure ABCD = Î”DBC, Î”ADB, Î”DPR and Î”HBK. Hence, there are a total of 17 + 4 + 4 = 25 triangles in the figure.

In the given figures there are 23 triangles which can be better understood with the help of following diagram. Now, in the above figure, The triangles of unit length present in the figure are Î”ADE, Î”DJF, Î”DEJ, Î”EJG, Î”FKH, Î”FKJ, Î”JKL, Î”JLG, Î”GLJ, Î”KMN, Î”KNL and Î”LNO i.e., 12 triangles. The triangles of length 2 units are Î”AFG, Î”DHL, Î”EKJ, Î”MJO, Î”FBN and Î”NGC and also there is one inverted triangle of length units i.e., Î”FGN. So, total number of triangles of length 2 units are 7. The triangles of length 3 units are Î”AHI, Î”BDO and Î”MEC i.e., 3 triangles. The triangle of length 4 units is Î”ABC i.e., 1 triangle. So, total number of triangles = 12 + 7 + 3 + 1 = 23

The figure, in question may be labelled as shown in following figure. There are 12 triangles in the figure, namely Î”EOG, Î”AGK, Î”KOR, Î”KGT, Î”TUP, Î”RUS, Î”SPV, Î”SUW, Î”WNG, Î”VNH, Î”HQJ and Î”HNC.
10 triangles are as follows: Î”ABG, Î”BCE, Î”AGE, Î”CDE, Î”ACE, Î”ABC, Î”BCG, Î”GCE, Î”AFE and Î”ABE.

From the figure, it is clear that there are 9 triangles in the upper half of the figure ABFE, namely Î”PEM, Î”PGI, Î”AEI, Î”EIN, Î”IKO, Î”QOF, Î”IBF, Î”INF and Î”IEF. Likewise, there are 9 triangles in the lower half EFCD of the main figure. There are 4 more triangles Î”EPR, Î”EIJ, Î”IFJ and Î”OFS. Hence, there are a total of 22 triangles in the figure.
There are 18 triangles in the figure namely, Î”ABC, Î”ABD, Î”ACD, Î”EFG, Î”EFH, Î”EGH, Î”IJK, Î”IJL, Î”IKL, Î”MNO, Î”MOP, Î”MNP, Î”QRU, Î”QVU, Î”RVU, Î”STU, Î”SWU and Î”TWU
